reviews.comment:
El lugar es lindo , la gente  del interior del negocio es amable peroooooo los encargados de la parte del secado del lavadero de autos no responden un buenas tardes ojo !!! Turno tarde sábado 24 /08/2019 la única persona atenta el chico que nos Recepciono y le pagamos el lavado , después bien Gracias . Eso se refuerza y trata en futuras reuniones de calidad . Venimos seguido hora lo evaluaremos .

(Translated by Google)
The place is nice, the people inside the business are friendly, BUT the staff in charge of the car wash drying area don't even respond to a simple "good afternoon"! On the afternoon shift, Saturday, August 24, 2019, the only attentive person was the young man who greeted us and to whom we paid for the wash. After that, he was fine, thank you. This issue will be addressed and discussed in future quality meetings. We come here often, so we will evaluate it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVdnNxTFZREAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene muchos lugares de carga habilitados y no había cola. También tienen muchos lugares para estacionar para el minimercado el cual me pareció grande y completo. Realmente me sorprendió gratamente, me imaginaba una estación mucho más chica todas las veces que pasé.

(Translated by Google)
It has plenty of charging stations and there was no line. They also have ample parking for the convenience store, which I found large and well-stocked. I was pleasantly surprised; I had imagined a much smaller station every time I'd passed by.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURVcXRpWTdBRRAB
